failedAssertions.reason: No visual benchmark comparison in FreqUI. Visualize Summary shows Trades Log and Trades Durations but no benchmark overlay. market_change in results shows 0.000%. The backend market_change endpoint returns data but FreqUI does not render it as a visual chart. FreqUI may not natively support benchmark overlay — likely needs custom frontend work or alternative integration approach.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Browser flow validator guidance section with login flow, testing approach, known issues from prior rounds, and concurrency limits for browser surface
